description_long: This is a vintage-style mechanical sewing machine mounted on a rectangular wooden base. The body is predominantly black metal with ornate gold floral patterns decorating the arm and base plate, giving it a classic, decorative appearance. A large, round handwheel is attached to one side, and a metallic needle mechanism is visible at the front, along with a presser foot and needle plate. The machine features a flat working surface with a metallic plate and a spool pin on top for thread placement. The overall construction appears robust, with visible screws and mechanical linkages, and the wooden base adds stability and a touch of elegance. The machine is designed for manual operation, with no visible electronic controls or digital displays.
description: A vintage black metal sewing machine with ornate gold patterns, mounted on a wooden base and featuring a large handwheel and metallic needle mechanism. The design is classic and decorative, with a robust, mechanical build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ornate gold floral patterns, the full length of the arm, the needle mechanism, and the wooden base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large round handwheel, the end of the arm, and the wooden base's grain.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the flat working surface, metallic plate, and the spool pin, with the gold patterns visible along the arm.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the machine, the handwheel, and the mechanical linkages, with the wooden base visible.
